recommendations.title: Beyond the Valley of the Dolls
recommendations.overview: An all-girl rock band moves to Hollywood in the hope of achieving success, only to fall into a whirlpool of wickedness and decadence.

recommendations.title: Beneath the Valley of the Ultra-Vixens
recommendations.overview: Believe it or not, even Smalltown USA, those unfulfilled and unrelieved in the midst of plenty reside. Levonna and Lamar could have the perfect relationship, were it not for Lamar's obsession with rear entry.

recommendations.title: Supervixens
recommendations.overview: Clint must flee after his wife is killed by a psychopathic cop, who tries to pin the murder on him.

recommendations.title: Faster, Pussycat! Kill! Kill!
recommendations.overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

recommendations.title: Vixen!
recommendations.overview: In a Canadian mountain resort, Vixen Palmer resides with her naive pilot husband Tom. While he's away flying in tourists, she sleeps with practically everybody including a husband and his wife, and even her biker brother. However, the only one she wo

recommendations.title: Jojo Rabbit
recommendations.overview: Jojo, a lonely German boy during World War II has his world shaken when he learns that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home. Influenced by a buffoonish imaginary version of Adolf Hitler, he begins to question his beliefs and confro

recommendations.title: Triumph of the Will
recommendations.overview: A showcase of German chancellor and Nazi Party leader Adolf Hitler at the 1934 Nuremberg Rally.

recommendations.title: Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In May 1940, the fate of World War II hangs on Winston Churchill, who must decide whether to negotiate with Adolf Hitler or fight on knowing that it could mean the end of the British Empire.

recommendations.title: Kung Fury
recommendations.overview: During an unfortunate series of events, a friend of Kung Fury is assassinated by the most dangerous kung fu master criminal of all time, Adolf Hitler, a.k.a Kung Führer.  Kung Fury decides to travel back in time to Nazi Germany in order to kill Hitle

recommendations.title: A Special Day
recommendations.overview: Two neighbours — a persecuted journalist and a resigned housewife — forge a strong bond on the day of Adolf Hitler's historic 1938 visit to Rome.
